risk-narrative-generate.summary: Robert Bosch GmbH is a well-established German manufacturing company with comprehensive regulatory compliance across all automated checks. The company appears in public business registries with consistent information, maintains strong domain security infrastructure, and shows no indicators of sanctions, political exposure, or financial crime. Minor informational findings relate to routine adverse media coverage typical of large multinational corporations.

flags.finding: Adverse media mentions detected (4 articles in regulatory category over past 12 months). These relate to business rebranding, humanitarian policy, and market reports rather than financial misconduct or regulatory violations.
flags.recommendation: Review article content if conducting deep compliance assessment. For standard know-your-business purposes, this level of regulatory coverage is typical for multinational corporations and does not indicate elevated risk.

flags.finding: LEI (Legal Entity Identifier) registered to 'Robert Bosch College UWC GmbH' at a different address (Freiburg) than the primary company registration (Gerlingen). This suggests LEI may reference a subsidiary or related entity rather than the main corporate entity.
flags.recommendation: Clarify which legal entity is the contracting party. If conducting business with the parent company (HRB 14000), verify that the correct entity name appears in contracts and invoices.

passed_checks: Company registered in German commercial registry (HRB 14000) with active status since 1917
Business address consistent with German jurisdiction
Not listed on any international sanctions lists (OFAC, EU, UN, UK, Australia, Switzerland checked)
No Politically Exposed Person (PEP) designation identified
Corporate email address (info@bosch.com) is legitimate, not disposable, verified with valid email server configuration
Domain (bosch.com) registered since 1995 with long tenure and proper renewal status
Domain protected with multiple transfer restrictions indicating deliberate security controls
SSL/TLS certificate valid and issued by trusted Certificate Authority (DigiCert), not expiring soon (expires 2027)
Email security properly configured with SPF (Sender Policy Framework) and DMARC (Domain-based Message Authentication, Reporting and Conformance) records
Domain reputation score 100/100 with grade A across security and deliverability checks
DNS infrastructure properly maintained with multiple name servers and security headers configured
data_sources_consulted: Global Legal Entity Identifier System (LEI Registry)
Open Sanctions Database (OFAC SDN, EU Financial Sanctions Framework, UN Security Council, UK FCDO, Australian DFAT, Swiss SECO lists)
